ticket: Does the HydraCalm serum have niacinamide? I have sensitive skin.
final_reply:
Thanks for your message. Here is what I found in our product knowledge base:

SKU SKN-SER-01. NOVA HydraCalm Serum. Category: skincare. Ingredients: hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, ceramide NP, fragrance-free. Sizing / guide: 30ml pump — patch test 24h for sensitive skin. Compatibility: Pairs with SPF in AM; avoid strong retinoids same night for first 2 weeks.

SKU APP-DEN-33. NOVA Stretch High-Rise Jean — Indigo. Category: apparel. Ingredients: . Sizing / guide: Denim: see size chart — model 5'8" wears 27; stretch ~2%. Compatibility: Machine cold wash; line dry to preserve stretch.
